top_signals.title: Sheinbaum Leans on Private Investors to Fix Beleaguered Grid
top_signals.summary: Investment in Mexico’s struggling electricity sector is showing fresh signs of life as a slew of deals in power plants, renewables and infrastructure offer momentum to President Claudia Sheinbaum’s push to modernize the grid.

top_signals.title: Ramaco Resources, REalloys ink offtake MoU for rare earths carbonate from Brook mine
top_signals.summary: Brook mine in Wyoming holds what is believed to be the nation’s largest unconventional deposit of rare earth elements and critical minerals sourced from coal and carbonaceous ore.
